pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh where the staging URL 'http://staging.local' is dynamically injected into wp_options and wp_posts.
Verified from setup_task.sh and export_result.sh, indicating the target migration URL for the local environment.
Verified from setup_task.sh which inserts the option_name 'migration_canary_widget' into the wp_options table.
Verified from the standard HTTP OK status code expected for a successfully repaired WordPress frontend, as checked in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated WordPress database corruptions injected via setup scripts. The staging URL to be replaced is exactly 'http://staging.local', and the target migration URL is 'http://localhost'. A canary option named 'migration_canary_widget' is dynamically injected to test for unsafe serialization replacements. A successful site repair will result in an HTTP status of 200.
